name: Monet-Inspired Impressionism
description: A style emulating the soft, vibrant aesthetic of Monet, focusing on color and light rather than detail.

art_style.line_styles: Minimal line work with soft edges to capture form without precise outlines.
art_style.inking_tools: Brush or digital tools to replicate the fluidity and texture of Impressionist painting.
art_style.shading_style: Light, airy shading that suggests depth through color variation rather than hard lines.
art_style.color_palette: Soft pastels mixed with lively accents, inspired by natural landscapes and light reflection.
art_style.registration: Loose registration allowing for color bleed, authenticating the Impressionist feel.
art_style.lettering_style: Handwritten style to keep the organic, free feel of the artwork.

character_style.anatomy_detail: Simplified, focusing on overall form rather than anatomical precision.
character_style.eye_style: Simple dots or light reflections to illustrate life without detail.
character_style.expression_exaggeration: Moderate; emotions conveyed through color and motion rather than detail.
character_style.silhouette_shape_language: Organic curves mimicking natural forms, avoiding sharp angles.
character_style.detail_complexity: Low; emphasis on color and light over intricate details.
